zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Somerville於1278年出生在英國斯塔福爾維其諾時，他的父親Sir Robert Somerville44歲，母親Isabel Merlay24歲。他於1294年與Margaret de Pype在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維其諾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1311年在英國被列為sheriff of bedfordshire。他去世於1356年1月23日在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年78歲，埋葬在英國越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Somerville于1278年出生在英国斯塔福爾維其諾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Somerville44岁，母亲Isabel Merlay24岁。他于1294年与Margaret de Pype在英国英格兰斯塔福爾維其諾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1311年在英国被列为sheriff of bedfordshire。他去世于1356年1月23日在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年78岁，埋葬在英国越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Somerville was born in 1278, in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Somerville, was 44 and his mother, Isabel Merlay, was 24. He married Margaret de Pype in 1294, in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1311, his occupation is listed as sheriff of bedfordshire in England. He died on 23 January 1356, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Somerville est né en 1278, à Wichnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Somerville, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabel Merlay, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Pype en 1294, à Wichnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1311, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of bedfordshire à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1356, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Burton Agnes, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Somerville 1278 in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Somerville 44 und seine Mutter Isabel Merlay 24. Er hat 1294 in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Pype geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1311 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of bedfordshire in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Januar 1356 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cossington, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Somerville è nato il nel 1278 nel Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Somerville, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Merlay, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Pype nel 1294, nel Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1311, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of bedfordshire nel England. Morì il 23 gennaio 1356, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Somervilleが1278年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィチノーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Somervilleは44歳，母Isabel Merlayは24歳であった。1294年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィチノーでMargaret de Pypeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1311年，イギリスでの職業はsheriff of bedfordshireと記録されている。彼は1356年1月23日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで78歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン アグネスにて埋葬された。

ko.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 배로 업 소르
ko.lifeSummary: Philip Somerville(이)가 1278년 영국 스태퍼드실르 위ch너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Somerville(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Merlay(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 위ch너에서 Margaret de Pype(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1311년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 sheriff of bedfordshire이었다. 그는 1356년 1월 23일 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 버턴 애그니스에 묻혔다.

pt.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Somerville nasceu em 1278, em Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Somerville, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Merlay, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Pype em 1294, em Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1311, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of bedfordshire em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1356, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: барроу упон соар, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Somerville родился в 1278 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Somerville было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Merlay, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Pype в 1294 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1311 году он работал по профессии sheriff of bedfordshire в местности Англия. Он умер 23 января 1356 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир, Англия.

es.Crossingtonshire, Barrow-upon-Soar, Leic: Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Somerville nació en 1278, en Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Somerville, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Isabel Merlay, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret de Pype en 1294, en Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1311, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of bedfordshire en Inglaterra. Murió el 23 de enero de 1356, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
